acceptance_targets: [chapter_16_f001] PASS if lines 191-210 include at least two concrete, checkable details of affair conduct/consequence (named event, lie, or practical cost) and one embodied reaction from each side of the call; FAIL if the passage still relies on abstract accountability phrases without those specifics.

[chapter_16_f002] PASS if the final 25 lines contain a new explicit condition imposed on Eli that changes what he is allowed to do upon arrival, and Eli gives a binding response before the last line; FAIL if the chapter still ends on movement/arrival without a fresh on-page relational cost.

[FBR-012] Pass if each revised list line references concrete chapter-specific stakes while preserving accountability intent, and the block no longer reads as reusable generic command text. Fail if lines remain mostly abstract imperatives that could be pasted from earlier chapters unchanged.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if lines 191-210 include at least two concrete, checkable details of affair conduct/consequence (named event, lie, or practical cost) and one embodied reaction from each side of the call; FAIL if the passage still relies on abstract accountability phrases without those specifics.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift in the breakup beat: Eli's accountability language stays abstract ("used this", "taking from you") at the exact moment the chapter needs concrete relational damage. The scene lands as controlled moral summary instead of fully embodied consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the call exchange in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:191-210 and the aftermath beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:241 so Eli names specific actions and harms (who was lied to, what was promised, what Marisol absorbed in practical terms). Keep the no-self-exoneration stance, but replace abstract confession phrasing with concrete scene facts and bodily response.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the final 25 lines contain a new explicit condition imposed on Eli that changes what he is allowed to do upon arrival, and Eli gives a binding response before the last line; FAIL if the chapter still ends on movement/arrival without a fresh on-page relational cost.
findings.problem: Timidity at the chapter endpoint: the narrative retreats to transit closure right before the first interpersonal collision, so the chapter's promised return-consequence remains mostly preparatory rather than dramatically tested on-page.
findings.rewrite_direction: Strengthen the ending span in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:283-309 with one immediate, irreversible interpersonal condition before cutoff (for example, an explicit household boundary or pre-entry rule with concrete consequence), not only arrival logistics.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if each revised list line references concrete chapter-specific stakes while preserving accountability intent, and the block no longer reads as reusable generic command text. Fail if lines remain mostly abstract imperatives that could be pasted from earlier chapters unchanged.
findings.problem: Style-bible token overfitting persists in Eli's self-command list. The rule list is functional, but the repeated imperative phrasing mirrors earlier chapters too closely and weakens late-book tonal variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the list at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5519 to snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5530 so each line is rooted in chapter-specific stakes (Nora, June, Marisol, train return) rather than abstract directives.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
